testCoverage: No new tests needed — 2-line rename fix. Verified all 194 existing tests pass including all @SpringBootTest tests (AuthenticationIT, KmpApplicationTests, AuthApiImplIT, UserApiImplIT) that were previously broken by the BeanDefinitionOverrideException.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Workers should be careful with @Bean names when the bean name could collide with @Component class names (Spring auto-generates bean name from class name). Convention: always use a unique descriptive bean name that doesn't match any class name in lowercase.

summary: Minimal, correct fix. Renamed @Bean('pipelineExecutor') to @Bean('pipelineTaskExecutor') in PipelineAsyncConfig.kt and updated @Async annotation in PipelineExecutor.kt. This resolved the BeanDefinitionOverrideException that broke all 53 @SpringBootTest tests. Verified with full test suite (194 tests, 0 failures when PostgreSQL running).
